title: Khon Kaen、Khon Kaen — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Khon Kaen、Khon Kaen的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Khon Kaen是Khon Kaen的一個城市，人口約400,000。A major educational and healthcare hub in northeastern Thailand with a very low cost of living and a growing international community centered around its universities.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
